_note: Weekly top-10 contributor leaderboard. Schedule this flow for Sunday 09:00 UTC (cron '0 9 * * 0'). Tool refs use the portable 'tool:<name>' form.
name: Weekly Contributor Leaderboard

config.script: const r=input.commits||{};const data=(r.items?r:(r.body&&r.body.items?r.body:(r.data&&r.data.items?r.data:r)))||{};const items=Array.isArray(data.items)?data.items:[];const counts={};for(const it of items){const login=(it.author&&it.author.login)||(it.commit&&it.commit.author&&it.commit.author.name)||'unknown';counts[login]=(counts[login]||0)+1;}const ranked=Object.keys(counts).map(function(k){return {login:k,n:counts[k]};}).sort(function(a,b){return b.n-a.n;});const top=ranked.slice(0,10);const medals=['🥇','🥈','🥉'];const boardFull=top.map(function(e,i){return (medals[i]||((i+1)+'.'))+' @'+e.login+' — '+e.n;}).join('\n');const teaser=top.slice(0,3).map(function(e,i){return (medals[i]||((i+1)+'.'))+' @'+e.login+' ('+e.n+')';}).join('  ');const weekOf=(input.dateInfo&&input.dateInfo.since)||'';return {boardFull:boardFull||'No commits this week.',teaser:teaser,total:items.length,count:ranked.length,weekOf:weekOf};

config.systemPrompt: You are the bitmask-stack community hype-bot: witty, enthusiastic, developer-to-developer, never corporate.
config.userPrompt: Write ONE short witty header line (max 120 characters, at most 1 emoji) announcing this week's bitmask-stack contributor leaderboard. Context: {{lb.total}} commits from {{lb.count}} contributors, week starting {{lb.weekOf}}. Output ONLY the single header line — no leaderboard, no quotes, no preamble.

config.script:
const l=input.lb;const link='https://github.com/bitmask-stack';const header=(input.hdr||'This week in bitmask-stack').trim();const full=header+'

'+l.boardFull+'

🔗 '+link;let x=header+'
'+l.teaser+'
🏆 Full leaderboard in our Discord/Telegram/Slack';if(x.length>275)x=x.slice(0,272)+'…';return {full:full,xtext:x};
